title: OpAssign type registration + schema + log.go OpAssign case
definition_of_done: OpAssign='assign' constant, ValidOpTypes updated, AssignedTo in Payload, schema updated. OpAssign case added to logPayloadSummary in log.go. Tests pass including property round-trip.
outcome: Added OpAssign='assign' constant to types.go. Updated ValidOpTypes. Added AssignedTo field to Payload. Updated schema. Added OpAssign case to logPayloadSummary in log.go. Updated property round-trip test to include OpAssign. All tests pass.

notes.msg: Scope overlap with E3 detected at claim time
